prior_phase_status: P5 Billing and History approved after corrective review
backend_findings: Admin/settings exists in the web app as HTML page and form POST routes, not JSON API endpoints.
GET /admin/settings renders settings.html and uses UserRepository.list_all plus permission matrix helpers.
POST /admin/settings/users/create and /admin/users/create create users from form fields username, password, role.
POST /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/update and /admin/users/{user_id}/update update role and active status from form fields role and is_active.
POST /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/password and /admin/users/{user_id}/password reset passwords from form fields new_password and confirm_new_password.
POST /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/permissions and /admin/users/{user_id}/permissions persist editable capability overrides from form fields matching capability keys.
POST /admin/settings/users/{user_id}/delete and /admin/users/{user_id}/delete delete users with last-admin and self-delete protections.
No JSON /api/admin/users or /api/settings/users endpoint was verified.

Backend capability definitions include settings_user_admin, monitor_access, vendor_management, generator_management, booking_create_update, booking_delete, billing_access, export_access, and read_only_operational_views.

The live backend web admin routes are guarded by require_role(ROLE_ADMIN), while the mobile app must continue using named PermissionService capability checks and must not introduce UI role-string comparisons.

objective: Implement a Phase 6 Admin module that faithfully represents the verified backend admin capability without inventing unsupported JSON APIs or scraping HTML.

behaviors: Do not change P1 auth restoration, bearer token attachment, logout, or router auth gating.
Do not change P2 generator inventory classification or permanent-generator exclusion.
Do not change P3 booking creation, retailer_out_of_stock handling, merge confirmation, bulk update minimum-item enforcement, cancellation, or delete flows.
Do not change P4 dashboard/calendar behavior.
Do not change P5 billing/history behavior.
Do not add HTML scraping or WebView-based admin management.
Do not invent JSON admin endpoints.

capabilities.settings_user_admin: Settings & User Admin capability. Use this for mobile admin visibility and route gating.
capabilities.monitor_access: View live monitor metrics and health checks.
capabilities.vendor_management: Create, update, and delete retailer and rental vendors.
capabilities.booking_create_update: Create bookings and manage booking items.
capabilities.billing_access: Access billing pages and billing line APIs.
capabilities.read_only_operational_views: View operational pages and read APIs.

backend_truth.admin_json_api_status: No JSON admin/user-management API was verified. Do not call invented /api/admin paths.
backend_truth.permission_override_repository: UserRepository stores per-user overrides in user_permission_overrides via set_permission_override/delete_permission_override/list_permission_overrides/list_permission_overrides_by_user, but these are only exposed through the HTML/form admin settings flow.

required_fixes.requirement: Add a mobile Admin screen at /admin gated by PermissionService.settingsUserAdmin.
required_fixes.notes: The screen must show Access Denied when settings_user_admin is false. Do not compare role strings in UI code.

Because no JSON admin API exists, do not implement functional user CRUD, role assignment, password reset, or permission override submission. Show a clear backend-limited state explaining that admin user management exists only on the web HTML/form flow until a JSON API is added.

required_fixes.requirement: Show the verified capability matrix as a read-only reference in the Admin screen.
required_fixes.notes: List the named capability keys from permissions.py with concise labels. This is local reference UI only; do not submit changes to backend.

required_fixes.requirement: Expose Admin navigation only for users with settings_user_admin.
required_fixes.notes: Add a More screen entry or equivalent route access pattern that is hidden when the capability is false.

optional_improvements: Add a short note that vendor and generator management are already implemented in the Directory module when the user has vendor_management or generator_management.
acceptance_criteria: Admin route exists and renders a real screen, not a placeholder scaffold.
Admin route and More navigation are gated by PermissionService.settingsUserAdmin.
No UI code checks role labels such as admin/operator to decide access.
No invented /api/admin, /api/settings, /api/users, invoice, or payment endpoints are called.
No HTML scraping, WebView admin panel, or form-post user CRUD is implemented.
The screen clearly explains that mobile user CRUD and permission editing require a backend JSON API.

The screen lists verified capability keys: settings_user_admin, monitor_access, vendor_management, generator_management, booking_create_update, booking_delete, billing_access, export_access, read_only_operational_views.

must_not_create: admin API repositories that call invented JSON endpoints
